info.description: Social network platform API using bounded context architecture
info.title: DarkVoid API

post.description: Sends a system announcement notification to all active users.
Sends a system announcement notification to a specific user.

get.description: Returns all roles defined in the system.

post.description: Creates a new role that can be assigned to users.

get.description: Returns basic counts for users and roles.
Returns a paginated list of all users. Supports filtering by status and search query.

parameters.description: Search by username, email, or display name
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter by active status (omit for all)
parameters.name: is_active

get.description: Returns the admin view of a single user including email and active status.
Returns all roles currently assigned to the specified user.

post.description: Grants a role to the specified user.
post.summary: Assign a role to a user

delete.description: Revokes a role from the specified user.
delete.summary: Remove a role from a user

patch.description: Sets the active status of a user account. Deactivated users cannot log in.

post.description: Send a password reset link to the specified email address

200.description: Reset link sent if account exists

post.description:
Authenticate user with username and password, returns access and refresh tokens.
Web clients (default): refresh_token is set as an HttpOnly cookie; omitted from response body.
Mobile clients (X-Client-Type: mobile): refresh_token is returned in the response body.

parameters.description: Set to 'mobile' to receive refresh_token in response body instead of HttpOnly cookie
parameters.name: X-Client-Type

post.description:
Revoke a refresh token to logout user from current session.
Web clients (default): refresh_token is read from the HttpOnly cookie automatically; request body is not required. Cookie is cleared on success.
Mobile clients (X-Client-Type: mobile): refresh_token must be provided in the request body.

parameters.description: Set to 'mobile' to send refresh_token in request body
parameters.name: X-Client-Type

parameters.description: Refresh token to revoke (mobile clients only)
parameters.name: token

post.description: Revoke all refresh tokens for the authenticated user

get.description: Get the authenticated user's information

put.description: Change the authenticated user's password (requires old password)

401.description: Invalid old password or not authenticated

post.description:
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token.
Web clients (default): refresh_token is read from the HttpOnly cookie automatically; request body is not required.
Mobile clients (X-Client-Type: mobile): refresh_token must be provided in the request body.

parameters.description: Set to 'mobile' to send/receive refresh_token in request/response body
parameters.name: X-Client-Type

post.description:
Create a new user account and return tokens (user is immediately logged in).
Web clients (default): refresh_token is set as an HttpOnly cookie; omitted from response body.
Mobile clients (X-Client-Type: mobile): refresh_token is returned in the response body.

parameters.description: Set to 'mobile' to receive refresh_token in response body instead of HttpOnly cookie
parameters.name: X-Client-Type

post.description: Resend the email verification link to the specified email address

200.description: Verification email sent if account exists

post.description: Reset the user's password using the token received via email
Verify a user's email address using the token sent via email

get.description: Get a cursor-paginated discovery feed of public posts. No authentication required; if a valid token is provided, is_liked is populated.
Get a scored, paginated feed of posts mixed from followed users and trending posts
Returns up to 10 hashtag names that start with the given prefix (min 2 chars). Results cached 2 minutes.
Returns the top trending hashtags based on post usage in the last 24 hours
Returns cursor-paginated public posts for a hashtag
Get the authenticated user's social profile

put.description: Update the authenticated user's social profile fields
Upload a new avatar image for the authenticated user
Upload a new cover image for the authenticated user

post.description:
Upload an image or video file. Returns the storage key and public URL.
Supported types: image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, image/gif, video/mp4, video/webm
Max size: 10 MB for images, 100 MB for videos.

get.description: Get a cursor-paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user

post.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Open a Server-Sent Events stream for real-time notifications. Pass JWT via Authorization header or ?token= query parameter.

parameters.description: JWT access token (alternative to Authorization header)
parameters.name: token

get.description: Get the number of unread notifications for the authenticated user

post.description: Mark a single notification as read
Create a new post with optional media attachments

get.description: Get a post by ID

put.description: Update content or visibility of an owned post

get.description: Get a paginated list of top-level comments for a post

post.description: Add a comment (or reply) to a post
Like the comment if not yet liked, unlike if already liked. Returns the new like state.

200.description: liked: true if now liked, false if now unliked

get.description: Get a paginated list of replies for a comment

post.description: Like the post if not yet liked, unlike if already liked. Returns the new like state.

200.description: liked: true if now liked, false if now unliked

get.description:
Search across users, posts, and hashtags in a single request.
Use type=all (default) to fetch top results from every category,
or specify type=users|posts|hashtags for a focused search.

parameters.description: Entity type: all | users | posts | hashtags (default: all)
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Max results per category (default 20, max 50; ignored for type=all)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get a cursor-paginated list of posts by a specific user

parameters.description: Filter by visibility: public, followers, private
parameters.name: visibility

get.description: Retrieve a user's information by UUID or username (with ?by=username)
get.summary: Get user by ID or username

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

put.description: Update user account fields (e.g. email) by UUID or username (with ?by=username)

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

delete.description: Soft delete a user account (sets is_active to false) by UUID or username (with ?by=username)

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

post.description: Follow a user by UUID or username (with ?by=username). No-op if already following.

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

delete.description: Unfollow a user by UUID or username (with ?by=username). No-op if not following.

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

get.description: Get a paginated list of users who follow the specified user by UUID or username (with ?by=username)

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

get.description: Get a paginated list of users that the specified user follows by UUID or username (with ?by=username)

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

get.description: Get a user's public social profile by UUID or username (with ?by=username). Optionally enriches is_following when the viewer is authenticated.

parameters.description: Resolve key as 'username' instead of UUID
parameters.name: by

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
